title: Krath Enchanter
content:
{{Top|fga|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Krathenchanter.jpg]] |name=''Krath Enchanter'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Tetan space yacht|Tetan Royal Space Yacht]][[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) |skeleton= |passengers=At least 1 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Pleasure [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] |commission= |destroyed=3998 BBY[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] |retired= |battles=[[Second Battle of Onderon]] |affiliation=[[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan Monarchy]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Keto family/Legends|Keto family]] |captains=Satal Keto |crewmembers=*[[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] *[[Aleema Keto]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|My scopes show a civilian spacecraft approaching the planet Onderon. Telesponder says she's a royal yacht out of the Empress Teta system.|Wing Three|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]}} The '''''Krath Enchanter''''' was the personal [[Tetan space yacht|Tetan Royal Space Yacht]] of [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto]], the heirs to the [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|throne]] of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]], in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In [[3998 BBY]], they traveled in the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to obtain [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]], stopping at the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] along the way. Once on Coruscant, the Ketos stole a [[Sith spellbook/Legends|Sith spellbook]] from the museum and flew the ''Krath Enchanter'' to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] after hearing that [[Darksider|dark side users]] were still prevalent there. The ''Krath Enchanter'' emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to find a large [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic fleet]] getting ready to commence an [[Second Battle of Onderon|attack]] on the Onderonian dark side regime, and despite the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] presence, Satal Keto flew the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] through the [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] to the planet below. However, the ship was hit by [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] fired by [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]] and crashed, although Satal and Aleema Keto managed to escape the wrecked ship before it exploded. ==Description== The ''Krath Enchanter'' was a large, ungainly [[Tetan space yacht|Tetan Royal Space Yacht]] with a [[Gold/Legends|golden]] [[Color/Legends|color]]. The [[Starship/Legends|starship]] had a tall but relatively narrow frame, and had two fan-shaped apparatuses protruding from it. The [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] was located at the top of the ship at the bow, and the ''Krath Enchanter'' was controlled by one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. Although the ship was of a bulky size, it was still fast enough to break through a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. ==History== {{Quote|The yacht's ''hit'', Aleema! We're going to ''die''—!''"
''"Don't be stupid, Satal! Keep the helm steady! We are going to ''live''!|Satal and Aleema Keto, after the ''Krath Enchanter'' was hit by Republic rocket-jumpers|}} [[File:KrathEnchanterCrash.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Krath Enchanter'' crashes in Iziz.]] The ''Krath Enchanter'' was a starship in the employ of the [[King/Legends|monarchy]] of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Specifically, the ''Krath Enchanter'' belonged to [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto]], the heirs to the [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan throne]]. In [[3998 BBY]], the Ketos and their friends formed a [[Sith cult/Legends|secret society]] named the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] and began dabbling in [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Sith sorcery/Legends|magic]]. Wishing to know more about the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], the Ketos flew the ''Krath Enchanter'' to the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], to take [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]] from the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. Along the way, the ''Krath Enchanter'' stopped at the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] to [[Fuel/Legends|refuel]]. As the ship had no cargo, it was cleared to land in [[Hangar/Legends|Docking Bay]] Four. After the ''Krath Enchanter'' landed on Coruscant, the Ketos stole a [[Sith spellbook/Legends|Sith spellbook]] from the museum, and after hearing a news report that stated that [[Darksider|practitioners]] of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] magic were still active on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], they decided to go there and hopefully unlock the tome's secrets. The Ketos made an unscheduled [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump in the ''Krath Enchanter'' to Onderon, and the ship emerged from hyperspace amidst a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic fleet]]. Although a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] warned the ''Krath Enchanter'' that it was in a [[Second Battle of Onderon|security military zone]], Satal Keto flew the ship directly through the [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]]. However, when the ''Krath Enchanter'' entered Onderon's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], the ship was blasted by [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|Republic rocket-jumpers]]. Satal was able to keep the ''Krath Enchanter'' steady as it hurtled toward the ground, but as the ship accelerated toward the planet's surface, it was hit again. The ''Krath Enchanter''{{'s}} [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] systems were destroyed, and the ship crashed into the ancient cobblestone streets of the Onderonian capital of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. Its landing gear was sheared off in the impact, and the ''Krath Enchanter'', now a fiery wreck, ground to a halt. As the fuel tanks ruptured and exploded, however, the Ketos were able to escape from the destroyed craft into the [[City/Legends|city]] streets. ==Commanders and crew== {{Quote|Satal! What are you ''doing?!'' You'll get us ''killed!''|Aleema Keto|}} Satal Keto served as the pilot and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''Krath Enchanter''. Keto was unafraid to take risks while flying the ''Krath Enchanter'', including piloting the ship through the Republic fleet over Onderon. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Krath Enchanter'' first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'', the third story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released in [[1994]]. The ship made its first appearance in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|first issue]], and also appeared in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|second and final issue]], in which it was destroyed. In these appearances, the ''Krath Enchanter'' was illustrated by [[Tony Akins]]. The ship also appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''The Freedon Nadd Uprising''. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Krath Enchanter}} *{{InsiderCite|27|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 2}} *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|''Enchanter''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Krath Enchanter }} [[Category:Tetan Royal Space Yachts]] [[Category:Tetan starships]]
